name: SelectionCard
purpose: Provides a higher-level selectable surface for prototypes and app flows that need visually polished option cards.
whenToUse: Use when a prototype needs product, batch, or option cards with status, metadata, and an optional action.
Use to prototype repeated selection patterns before deciding whether a lower-level shared component should be promoted.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for simple static text sections where a plain Card is enough.
Do not automatically promote every product-specific selection shape into the shared component layer.
accessibilityRequirements: If the card includes an action, ensure the action label clearly explains the outcome.
Do not rely on color alone to communicate selected state.
